query: SELECT COALESCE(source_repo, CASE WHEN repo_owner IS NOT NULL AND repo_name IS NOT NULL THEN repo_owner || '/' || repo_name ELSE NULL END) AS "repo: String", COUNT(*) AS "n!: i64" FROM skills WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY COALESCE(source_repo, CASE WHEN repo_owner IS NOT NULL AND repo_name IS NOT NULL THEN repo_owner || '/' || repo_name ELSE NULL END) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10
